items.caption: A detailed anatomical illustration of the bones of the shoulder girdle. it features a diagram of the human shoulder with labels indicating the different bones and their relationships. the bones are color-coded and labeled with their names, such as "acromio-clavicular joint," "lateral (acromial) end," "superior view," "anterior," "stemal end," "posteriolateral view," "inferior view," and "right clavicle." the illustration is labeled as "figure 5.20a-b" and is titled "bones of the shoulder girdle." the diagram provides a comprehensive view of the shoulder's skeletal structure, including the clavicle, scapula, and humerus.
